title: apollo The HOUSEWARES Brand Plate Stand Corner, Organizer for Kitchen, Size: 23x23cm, White
features: SPACE-SAVING SOLUTION: Maximize your kitchen space with the Apollo Housewares corner plate stand, a space-saving solution designed to keep your plates and pots organized and easily accessible. Whether nestled inside your cupboards or displayed proudly on your countertop, this versatile stand ensures efficient use of space while adding a touch of organization to your culinary domain.
DURABLE MATERIAL: Crafted from robust wire construction and coated with a resilient white finish for lasting durability.
DURABLE MATERIAL: Made from a high-quality triple chromium-plated wire for a long-lasting shine.
SIMPLE TO CLEAN: wipe the surface with a damp cloth. Do not soak in the water in order to preserve the quality of the product.
This product comes ASSEMBLED and READY TO USE. No extra tools or glue required.
